Your Trading Career Starts Here

Pass our demo evaluation. Get paid, even if you're in drawdown.

We pay you to trade with ease.

Pass the Evaluation. Smart Reset Guarantee.

Our evaluations come with a Smart Reset Guarantee — 1-Step accounts get a free reset, and 3-Step accounts get a 75% discount (as long as you follow the rules). Trade with confidence knowing you have a safety net.

01
Secure a Monthly Payout From Month 1

With our 1-step evaluation, you are rewarded for professional discipline, not just volatility. To unlock your Monthly Reward, simply pass the evaluation, keep drawdown above -3.5%, and log at least 3 profitable trading days (0.5% gain each). Trade with confidence, backed by a predictable revenue stream.

02
Your Monthly Payout Is Just the Start.

Earn an 80% performance split on every simulated gain you generate. Receive consistency rewards even during flat months. Scale your payouts as your performance grows.

03
Start Your Trading Career
Compare plans and features

Find the program for you & launch your career

Why Traders Build
Careers at Lark

The main reasons why traders choose to trade with Lark.

Lightning-Fast Payouts

Enjoy the Industry's Fastest Payouts with a 4-Hour Average Payout Time!

Challenge Concierge

You'll never trade alone. Get white-glove onboarding with a personal guide to set you up, walk you through risk, and help you pass with confidence.

Instant Funding Option

Don't want to wait? Skip the evaluation and get funded today with our instant track. Great for pros who are ready to go now.

Smart Reset Guarantee

1-Step accounts get a free reset, and 3-Step accounts get a 75% discount on their retry — as long as you meet the criteria. We reward effort and discipline, not just results.

Lark Base (1-step)

Earn a 0.5% monthly base plus performance bonuses. Build consistent income as a professional trader.

No News Restrictions

Trade freely during high-impact news events without any restrictions or limitations!

Real Traders, Real Payouts

Recent Payouts to Our Traders
About Us

Our journey to become the most transparent prop firm

July 2022
The Beginning

After 5 years of being a trader Matt, was tired of the Time Limit Challenges, and open Lark Funding. One of the first firms without time limits.

July 2023
First Year Success

Multiple firms start to close due to unreasonable rules, and denied payouts. Lark Funding reaches his first year with 0 payout denials.

Today
Industry Leadership

Lark Funding becomes the first trading firm to offer a Lark Base track option and a Smart Reset Guarantee — free resets on 1-Step accounts and 75% off on 3-Step accounts.

Smart Reset Guarantee
Trade with Confidence

Meet two simple requirements and restart your evaluation for free, anytime

Keep Drawdown Under 5%

Maintain your account drawdown below 5% of your total account value

Max 1% Loss Per Trade

Don't lose more than 1% in any single trade to stay eligible

100% Free Restart

Surrender your account in your dashboard and receive a 100% discount code to start fresh

Next slide

All content published and distributed under the Lark Funding brand is licensed by Lark Dashboards Inc., which operates this website and provides all services offered herein. Lark Funding Inc. provides content for general informational purposes only. None of the information provided by Lark Funding Inc. or contained herein constitutes investment advice, an offer or solicitation of an offer to buy or sell securities, or a recommendation, endorsement, or sponsorship of any security, company, or fund. The information on this site is not directed at residents in any country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local laws or regulations. Lark Funding Inc. does not provide brokerage services, trading services or accept or hold custody of investor funds. All program fees are used for operating costs, including but not limited to staff, technology, and other business-related expenses. Lark Funding Inc. itself does not carry out any regulated activities; our exclusive activity is Demo Trading Education and, therefore, is not required to be authorized by regulatory authorities. All services, payments, and operations are managed by Lark Dashboards Inc., under license.

The accounts utilized for our services are exclusively simulated demo accounts. Lark Funding Inc. only offers access to demo accounts within a simulated trading environment. The services offered aim to assess professional skills. We encourage clients to conduct a comprehensive review of the program requirements before enrolling in any services. Please be aware that we do not offer specific investment advice, business consulting, analysis of investment opportunities, or any general recommendations on trading investment instruments. Trading in financial markets carries a high level of risk, and we advise against risking more than you can afford to lose.
